children.name: shootAngle
children.title: Shooting Angle
children.tooltip: The angle that defines the direction the cannon will shoot at.

children.name: hidden
children.title: Invisible
children.tooltip: When true, the cannon is hidden and bullets will appear to be shot from nothing. Intended for use with blocks

children.name: noblockcollision
children.title: No Collision
children.tooltip: When true, the projectile fired by the cannon will pass through blocks regardless of its individual settings.

children.name: roundDelay
children.title: Delay Between Rounds
children.tooltip: The amount of time that the cannon will wait before shooting another round of cannonballs, measured in seconds.

children.name: shootDelay
children.title: Delay Between Shots
children.tooltip: The amount of time that the cannon will wait before shooting in the same round, measured in seconds.

children.name: shotsPerRound
children.title: Shots per Round
children.tooltip: The amount of cannonballs that the cannon will shoot every round.

children.name: multiplier
children.title: Speed Multiplier
children.tooltip: Modifies the speed at which projectiles are shot.

children.name: projectile
children.title: Projectile
children.tooltip: If true, the spawned NPC has its 'Projectile' flag set.

children.name: constantRotation
children.title: Constant Rotation
children.tooltip: The cannon will constantly rotate by this value per second if this option is not 0.

children.name: pAim
children.title: Aims at Player?
children.tooltip: Enabling this will make the cannon aim at the nearest player (Will disable constant rotation).
